assignments.name: Add_Separator_to_Child_Exemption_Values
assignments.label: Add Separator to Child Exemption Values

decisions.name: Can_user_end_exemption
decisions.label: Can user end exemption
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: User does not own Exemption or Exemption is already ended

decisions.name: SendEmailIfLocalAuthorityAccountExists
decisions.label: Send Email If Local Authority Account Exists

formulas.name: WhyEndingExemptionSubText
formulas.expression:
"

" + " You are ending exemption: " + "" + {!Get_Selected_Exemption_Type.Exemption_Type__r.Name} + " " + {!Get_Selected_Exemption_Type.Exemption_Type_Code__c} + ""+ " for the property " + "" + {!Get_Selected_Exemption_Type.Exemption__r.PropertyAddress__c} + ", " + {!Get_Selected_Exemption_Type.Exemption__r.PropertyPostcode__c} + "

"

value.stringValue:
{!Exemption_Ref_Number_Formatted} Are you sure you want to end this exemption?

You are ending exemption {!Get_Selected_Exemption_Type.Exemption_Type__r.Name} {!Get_Selected_Exemption_Type.Exemption_Type_Code__c} for the property {!Get_Selected_Exemption_Type.Exemption__r.PropertyAddress__c}, {!Get_Selected_Exemption_Type.Exemption__r.PropertyPostcode__c}

Exemption reference number: {!SelectedChildExemptionRef}

You should receive a confirmation email within 72 hours.

Your exemption will now show in the ended section of your dashboard

Letting your property

If you want to continue letting this property you will need to either:

  • raise the energy performance certificate to Band E or above, or
  • register another exemption
Explain why you are ending this exemption
Select the exemption you want to end
Select why you are ending this exemption
Tell us why you are ending this exemption
